candidate_llm_application: Espalier-trellis adapter: human-authored offline sparse trellis prior with out-of-trellis gradient zero + sequential cumulative fine-tune + compositional trellis union

results.title: Espalier — RHS
results.snippet: Source-domain: horizontal cordon training + annual out-of-plane pruning.
results.rationale: Pure source-domain horticulture page. No LLM, no adapter, no gradient discipline. Zero overlap with LLM-side content words.

results.title: How to Espalier — Garden.org
results.snippet: Source-domain: multi-year process; 3-5 years for structure.
results.rationale: Source-domain only. Gardening article describing tree training. No LLM machinery.

results.title: Art of Espalier Pruning — Orchard People
results.rationale: Source-domain horticultural pruning guide. No LLM mapping.

results.title: MLAE: Masked LoRA Experts (2024/5 v2)
results.snippet: LLM-side: masked LoRA experts with fixed/stochastic/mixed masking strategies.
keyword_overlap_terms: out-of-trellis gradient zero (~ masked LoRA → out-of-mask weights inactive)
results.rationale: MLAE applies fixed binary masks to LoRA adapter parameters. Under a fixed mask, only in-mask coordinates receive updates; out-of-mask are effectively zero. This is operationally equivalent to the espalier discipline (trellis-prior adapter + out-of-trellis gradient zero). Also discusses expert composition which maps to compositional trellis union. Hit on all three rule legs.

results.title: ProxSparse: Semi-Structured Sparsity Masks for Pretrained LLMs (2025/2)
results.snippet: LLM-side: regularized learning of sparsity mask; once fixed, weight-space constant.
keyword_overlap_terms: out-of-trellis gradient zero (~ out-of-mask zero after mask fixed)
results.rationale: ProxSparse LEARNS the mask via regularization, not human-authored. After the mask freezes, out-of-mask is zero — that part matches espalier discipline. But the candidate's distinguishing claim is the human-authored offline prior. Learned mask is closer to movement pruning / lottery ticket family. Semantic similarity is moderate but below 0.7; functional equivalence is borderline below 0.7. Keyword overlap count = 1 (only out-of-mask zero parallel). Does not hit any leg.

results.title: Sparse Adapters for Scalable Merging of PEFT Experts (2025/7)
keyword_overlap_terms: compositional trellis union (~ merging of PEFT experts via mask)
results.rationale: Sparse adapters merged across PEFT experts directly corresponds to the candidate's 'compositional trellis union' — distinct sparse adapter masks unioned at deployment. Also each sparse adapter has out-of-mask zero by construction. Two content-word equivalences and functional equivalence just at threshold. Hits on keyword overlap (>=2) and functional_equivalence (~0.71 >= 0.7).

results.title: Low-Rank Adapters meet NAS for LLM Compression (2025/1)
results.snippet: LLM-side: NAS to design adapter sparsity.
keyword_overlap_terms: trellis-prior adapter (~ structured adapter, but NAS-searched not human-authored)
results.rationale: NAS searches the adapter sparsity structure automatically rather than using a human-authored offline trellis. Lacks the cumulative-along-trellis sequential fine-tune and explicit out-of-trellis gradient zero training-time discipline. No leg passes threshold.

results.title: Alignment-Constrained Dynamic Pruning (2025/11)
results.snippet: LLM-side: constraint-satisfying pruning for safe LLMs.
results.rationale: Dynamic pruning with alignment constraints — pruning is dynamic, not a fixed authored prior. Does not match espalier trellis as authored offline sparse pattern with gradient zero discipline. No content-word equivalence above threshold.
